title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.160 - Board and living quarters for employees of institutions
text:
191.160.  Board and living quarters for employees of institutions. — The department of social services may provide any employee in any institution under its control with board and living quarters in addition to salary, or wages, when the director shall determine that it is for the best interest of the state to do so.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 314 § 10d, A.L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
